title: BetterModded
description: A modpack that improves modded experience
body:
# BetterModded

**Welcome to BetterModded**. BetterModded is a simple modpack with some interesting mods for better modded gameplay.
**WARNING : FABRIC VERSION IS DISCONTINUED !!!**

There are several popular and less popular mods, including Biomes of Planty for improved biomes, Ambient Sounds for sounds, and Fancy Menu for customized menus..

To learn how to play the modpack, search the wiki of its included mods or visit the modpack's wiki, which will be released soon.

This modpack is licensed under the [MIT License](https://mit-license.org/).

*This modpacks uses Discord RPC, If you don't want the Discord RPC, go to the config file in your `.minecraft` folder or your Modrinth app profile. Then, go to the "simple-rpc" section and change `enabled = true` to `false` in the simple-rpc's config file.*


## Quick Presentation

On the **main menu**, you will find four buttons: the **Options** button, the **Singleplayer** button, the **Multiplayer** button, and a fourth button called **"BetterModded Servers"**. This button will allow you to join a multiplayer servers with the BetterModded modpack (Beta 1.0.4+). It will open a Menu with all the BetterModded Servers, You can add servers by submetting a request in the Discord, by asking to BloraMc or any admin contributors. Or by submitting a issue with the server submitting tag on [the Github](https://lystech.org/404)

*Don't forget to check the wiki for more info @ [BetterModded Wiki](https://lystech.org/404).*  
*And report bugs or ask for features @ [BetterModded Issues](https://lystech.org/404).*

*Join the Discord if you want to contribute to the mod or just chat @ [Discord](https://discord.gg/Bw7MV7yEVW).*

A Fabric version is being developed. The Fabric version of this modpack does not have all the same features as the Forge version but could be a great option if your PC doesn't support the Forge version. The Fabric version has some features that Forge doesn't have. Although it has fewer features, the Fabric version can still be a great choice if your PC is not powerful enough to support the Forge version. The Fabric version is not updated as frequently as the Forge version, but all the essential updates from the Forge version are included in the Fabric version. Additionally, Fabric is a great option if you prefer a less modded gameplay experience.
